scenarios.name: partition-recovery
scenarios.description: Network partition and CRDT convergence after recovery

scenarios.name: delay-convergence
scenarios.description: High latency impact on CRDT convergence time

scenarios.name: crash-recovery
scenarios.description: Stop a container, wait, restart, verify CRDT convergence

scenarios.name: asymmetric-partition
scenarios.description: Block A->B but allow B->A using iptables rules, verify consistency

scenarios.name: rolling-partition
scenarios.description: Sequentially isolate each node, then heal all, verify convergence

scenarios.name: node-rejoin
scenarios.description: Stop node, write to remaining, restart stopped node, verify sync
